series_metadata.series_description: Material originated by this office that pertains to records retention. This includes but may not be limited to record analysis work sheets, records schedules, documents and material created to assist in records inventory process.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superceded and then destroy at end of fiscal year (FY). ; Electronic: Retain until superceded and then destroy at end of fiscal year (FY)., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
